nodes.name: Kikuyu mountain greenbul
nodes.summary: Kikuyu mountain greenbul是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Western mountain greenbul，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Western mountain greenbul
nodes.summary: Western mountain greenbul（Western mountain greenbul），已关联1个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Western mountain greenbul may refer to several species of birds, including: * Olive-breasted greenbul, found in eastern and central Africa * Western greenbul, found in west-central Africa Category:Birds by common name
